overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character journeying through a decayed urban industrial zone beneath elevated highways, transitioning from dirt lots and scaffolding areas to a commercial city street with traffic. The environment features dystopian architecture mixing abandoned buildings with futuristic megastructures and holographic billboards under a clear desert-like sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial lot beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the desolate dirt lot toward the distant bridge structure, passing dry vegetation and construction debris

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance toward the overpass
person standing near the yellow building facade

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in blue graffiti tags
massive concrete highway structure with support columns
decaying multi-story building with broken windows and air conditioning units
construction barriers with red and white stripes blocking off areas
large bridge structure visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit abandoned industrial lot with dry dirt ground and sparse vegetation. The camera moves forward past a yellow graffiti-covered wall on the left, with a massive concrete highway overpass dominating the right side. In the distance, a suspension bridge is visible between industrial buildings. A few pedestrians are scattered throughout the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with construction scaffolding

events.description: passing a food cart with yellow umbrella and blue containers on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the highway overpass, navigating between scaffolding structures and support columns

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking past the camera toward the foreground
pedestrian in pink clothing walking away under the overpass

entered.detail: rusty metal scaffolding structure with wooden planks
massive circular stadium-like structure with metallic exterior
street food cart with yellow umbrella and blue storage containers

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower passage under the elevated highway, with the sky partially blocked by the concrete deck above. Metal scaffolding appears on the right, and a massive circular megastructure becomes visible in the distance. The camera passes a food cart with a yellow umbrella and encounters pedestrians moving in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with megastructure and transition to alley

events.description: turning right to navigate around the base of the circular megastructure
entering narrow alleyway with construction barriers and trash containers

agents.ego_description: navigating around the megastructure and turning into a narrow passage with blue portable toilets and trash bags

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking together near the megastructure base

entered.detail: decaying office complex with multiple levels and broken windows
blue portable sanitation unit next to barriers
piles of garbage bags and debris stacked against barriers
tall concrete wall of adjacent building creating narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide plaza dominated by the massive circular megastructure. The camera turns right to navigate around it, passing palm trees and abandoned office buildings. The ground transitions from dirt to a more packed surface as the camera enters a narrow alleyway lined with red and white construction barriers, blue portable toilets, and piles of trash bags.

scene_state.functional_zone: service alley transitioning to commercial street

events.description: exiting the narrow alley onto the paved commercial street with buildings and traffic

agents.ego_description: moving through the confined alley space and emerging onto the open sidewalk, passing utility poles and street furniture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in casual clothing walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with 07 signage and multiple storefronts
wooden utility pole with overhead wires crossing the street
large orange billboard structure displaying Troublemaker advertisement

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow service alley with concrete sidewalks, trash piles, and construction barriers. The scene transitions as the camera emerges onto a commercial street, revealing the building with 07 signage, palm trees, and a large orange billboard. The environment shifts from enclosed industrial to open urban commercial with visible street traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with traffic and billboards

events.description: police officer in uniform walking on the sidewalk ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past pedestrians and alongside moving traffic, approaching the police officer

notable_agents.action: police officer in dark uniform walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
blue truck driving along the multi-lane street

entered.detail: tall street light with multiple lamps and electrical equipment
modern high-rise building with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on a busy urban commercial street with asphalt pavement and moving vehicle traffic. The camera walks along the sidewalk past the prominent orange Troublemaker billboard and various commercial buildings. A police officer walks toward the camera while vehicles including a blue truck pass by on the multi-lane road. Modern glass skyscrapers rise in the background contrasting with the earlier decayed industrial environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a decayed industrial zone that gradually transforms into a bustling urban commercial district. It begins in a sunlit abandoned lot with dry dirt and graffiti-covered walls, moving beneath the heavy concrete shadow of a highway overpass where metal scaffolding and food carts line the path. As the camera emerges from the underpass, the environment opens into a wide plaza dominated by a massive circular megastructure before shifting into a narrow service alley cluttered with construction barriers and trash. The scene then transitions from these enclosed industrial corridors onto a wide commercial street, where the dirt ground gives way to asphalt and the skyline shifts toward modern glass skyscrapers. Finally, the camera navigates a busy sidewalk past a large orange billboard and moving vehicle traffic, completing the journey from urban decay to a high-tech city center.
